path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\02. Duck Hunt Medley (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Very cool that they remixed this soundtrack (which totals to less than a minute) together into this. It does a good job, especially considering how difficult it is to work with this material (I know about that because I made a lofi remix of some duck hunt music).
title: Duck Hunt Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\01. Duck Hunt Medley.mp3
description: Kinda over-the-top remix, but I'm happy Duck Hunt got some love!
title: Duck Hunt Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\03. Balloon Fight Medley.mp3
description: Put a pic of villager for this one because of up-b. I think this track is pretty good all things considered.
title: Balloon Fight Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\04. Balloon Trip (Brawl).mp3
description: This remix is cheeky as fuck and pretty cheap-sounding. It makes for good clown music.
title: Balloon Trip
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\05. Balloon Trip (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: A fun remix working very closely with the original music. I've always enjoyed Balloon Trip, although the little cameo in WarioWare: Smooth Moves is the best version if you ask me (Nintendo Land a close second).
title: Balloon Trip
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\06. Balloon Fight.mp3
description: Melee wasn't one for putting in random original music but it made an exception for Balloon Fight which for some reason played on the Icicle Mountain stage. Why not! It's definitely one of the better NES songs out there.
title: Balloon Fight
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\07. Clu Clu Land.mp3
description: This is a super fun ragtime (?) remix of this obscure NES game. It played on Brawl's ice climber stage so I associate it with that. I like it.
title: Clu Clu Land
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\08. Ice Climber (Melee).mp3
description: A fantastic classic. So cool that they went for the blues style with the walking bass. Whoever composed the original Ice Climber soundtrack must have known this was coming.
title: Ice Climber
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\10. Ice Climber (Brawl).mp3
description: I loved this when I was younger because I had a weird obsession with the Ice Climbers. It's a more is more kinda remix but I always liked that they at least attempted to get the music to line up to events of the 'Summit' stage - it always immediately went out of time though.
title: Ice Climber
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\12. Wrecking Crew Medley (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: This remix is mid until a minute in when it suddenly picks up. I'm hyped, my shoulders are going, then BAM golden hammer theme, hits like a truck.
title: Wrecking Crew Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\11. Wrecking Crew Medley.mp3
description: Kinda jazzy version of this music. I'm not against it.
title: Wrecking Crew Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\13. Wrecking Crew Retro Medley.mp3
description: A mix of all the original tracks from this NES game. Not too much to report here.
title: Wrecking Crew Retro Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\14. Power-Up Music - Wrecking Crew.mp3
description: This was from Brawl, the Mario Bros stage. It's great in the context of the smash 4 remix, but on its own like this it's a no.
title: Power-Up Music - Wrecking Crew
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\15. Stack-Up & Gyromite.mp3
description: This is the single actual R.O.B. song! I don't think it's that good. One funny thing is that 95% of it from Stack-Up, it just has this little jingle from Gyromite.
title: Stack-Up/Gyromite
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\16. Mach Rider.mp3
description: This is a banger track from an obscure NES game that they honestly did a great job remixing. The melody to me sounds funny, it goes between batman to a car insurance jingle.
title: Mach Rider
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\17. Famicom Medley (Brawl).mp3
description: Wow, I didn't know that in Brawl they had a different Famicom medley! It's a bit all over the place with the fade ins and outs. Can't imagine enjoying this in a battle.
title: Famicom Medley
composers: Koji Kondo, Hirokazu Tanaka, Akito Nakatsuka, Yukio Kaneoka, Hideaki Shimizu, Kenji Yamamoto
contributors: Koji Kondo, Hirokazu Tanaka, Akito Nakatsuka, Yukio Kaneoka, Hideaki Shimizu, Kenji Yamamoto
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\18. Famicom Medley.mp3
description: They replaced the Famicom medley with this one! This one has way more recognisable music. Zelda, Dr Mario, Metroid, Duck Hunt, Punch Out and Kid Icarus.
title: Famicom Medley
composers: Koji Kondo, Akito Nakatsuka, Hirokazu Tanaka, Yukio Kaneoka, Kenji Yamamoto
contributors: Koji Kondo, Akito Nakatsuka, Hirokazu Tanaka, Yukio Kaneoka, Kenji Yamamoto
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\19. The Mysterious Murasame Castle Medley.mp3
description: This is great! Love the trombone part.
title: The Mysterious Murasame Castle Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\20. Douchuumen - The Mysterious Murasame Castle.mp3
description: I remember in Brawl times thinking this must be the worst track in the game.
title: Douchuumen
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\21. Shin Onigashima Medley.mp3
description: This is wild. From Brawl times this 3-minute loop with an epic prog rock symphony for this obscure NES game from Japan. Shout-outs to Smash for making things like this possible.
title: Shin Onigashima Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\22. Title Theme - 3D Hot Rally.mp3
description: This is a pretty generic rock remix of a boring NES song.
title: Title Theme
composers: Soyo Oka, Hiroaki Suga, Hideki Kanazashi
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other
original-game: Famicom Grand Prix II: 3D Hot Rally

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\23. Tetris - Type A.mp3
description: Love this. I always loved how needlessly epic it was. Just the opening note is great. Only now do I realise it is, of course, Yoko Shimomura.
title: Tetris: Type A
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\24. Tetris - Type B.mp3
description: So much to enjoy about this remix. Did you know that Type B was the only new music they made for Tetris? Everything was public domain. This remixer decided to respect the soundtrack's Russian folk music history by making it... Russian folk music. It's so great. And when the chiptunes come in? So great.
title: Tetris: Type B
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\25. Yūyūki Medley.mp3
description: This game is a spiritual successor to Shin Onigashima but couldn't be further away in terms of what kind of remix it is. It's wild and all over the place. Like not necessarily bad but it just constantly changes.
title: Yūyūki Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\29. Light Plane (Vocal Mix) (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Love the vibes on this Light Plane remix. It's cheeky, it's camp, it's fun. There's also another version supposedly without vocals but it's hilarious because the vocals are still audible they've just been turned down ever so slightly.
title: Light Plane (Vocal Mix) (for 3DS / Wii U)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\26. Light Plane.mp3
description: This remix is so good!! I've always loved Light Plane and here comes this absolutely stellar remix. Love the saxophone and synth solos. And how after the solos there's this sound of a plane flying by, it's great.
title: Light Plane
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\27. Light Plane.mp3
description: It's the original, it's great.
title: Light Plane
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\30. Turbo Jet.mp3
description: I'm obsessed with remix, it's so great!! Just great vibes all round. How does Pilotwings just have the best music like this.
title: Turbo Jet
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\31. Pedal Glider.mp3
description: Absolutely loving this smooth ass track from Pilotwings Resort. The original track is great, and you'd think she would make it more 'smashified' but no she leaned into the chill vibes and now we have this masterpiece.
title: Pedal Glider
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\32. Tunnel Scene - X.mp3
description: Actual huge banger! I will never forget Sakurai showcasing this song on the Brawl website because he loves an obscure gem. Love to have some dance music in smash.
title: Tunnel Scene - X
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\33. Tunnel Theme - X-Scape.mp3
description: The original version of this song, it's great! There mix goes harder though.
title: Tunnel Theme - X-Scape
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\34. Lip's Theme - Panel de Pon.mp3
description: This is very girlypop! It's fun! Btw Panel de Pon is a banger puzzle game available on the Switch online, you should play it.
title: Lip's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\35. Culdcept.mp3
description: Culdcept is an obscure strategy game that they for some reason included. I don't think this remix is great.
title: Culdcept
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\36. Revolt -Striving for Hope-.mp3
description: It does sound quite nice. Obscure-ass game.
title: Revolt -Striving for Hope-
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\37. Worthy Rival Battle.mp3
description: Hmm I dunno about this one.
title: Worthy Rival Battle
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\38. Golden Forest.mp3
description: Shoutouts to 1080° Snowboarding, I loved that game. There are much better tracks from it though.
title: Golden Forest
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

filename: 39. Battle Scene & Final Boss - Golden Sun.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\39. Battle Scene & Final Boss - Golden Sun.mp3
description: People rave about Golden Sun but I've listened to the soundtracks and they don't do anything for me. It might have something to do with trying and failing to play them as a child. I think this music is a bit too all over the place for me.
title: Battle Scene / Final Boss
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\40. Weyard.mp3
description: This doesn't do anything for me.
title: Weyard
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\41. Proof of a Hero ~ 4Version.mp3
description: This is very plain.
title: Proof of a Hero ~ 4Version
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\42. Roar & Rathalos.mp3
description: I actively dislike listening to this. I don't know anything about Monster Hunter but what is going on here?
title: Roar/Rathalos
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\43. PictoChat.mp3
description: Weird track! 15 seconds of fast jazz into a minute of bizarre ambient DS noises. Why the fuck not.
title: PictoChat
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\44. Electroplankton.mp3
description: To think they actually remixed this!! Hell yes this is why I love smash. They're unafraid to go there. I'm also down with the fun starman theme they threw in there.
title: Electroplankton
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\45. Electroplankton.mp3
description: It's just ambience which means it's a no from me. Playing a game of smash to this isn't good.
title: Electroplankton
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\47. Bathtime Theme (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Love that this is the unofficial Nintendogs theme. This remix is so cheeky and fun. I especially love the B section. I do prefer this version over the 'vocal' version, even if you can still hear vocals here.
title: Bathtime Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\46. Bathtime Theme.mp3
description: It's quite cool but I don't think it elevates the source material to the heights it deserves. The Smash 4 remix nails the vibe perfectly so this feels überflüssig.
title: Bathtime Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

filename: 49. Brain Age - Train Your Brain in Minutes a Day!.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\49. Brain Age - Train Your Brain in Minutes a Day!.mp3
description: We're entering deep into frutiger aero territory with this DS music. This has two distinct parts and I especially enjoy the second part.
title: Brain Age: Train Your Brain in Minutes a Day!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other
original-game: Brain Age: Train Your Brain in Minutes a Day!

filename: 50. Menu - Brain Age 2 - More Training in Minutes a Day!.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\50. Menu - Brain Age 2 - More Training in Minutes a Day!.mp3
description: This is just the best part from the previous Brain Age track.
title: Menu - Brain Age 2: More Training in Minutes a Day!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other
original-game: Brain Age 2: More Training in Minutes a Day!

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\51. Title Theme - Big Brain Academy.mp3
description: Don't love these pikmin-ass vocals. Also the song gets weird.
title: Title Theme - Big Brain Academy
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\52. The Valedictory Elegy.mp3
description: Very epic and I know it's popular but honestly this does nothing for me.
title: The Valedictory Elegy
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\53. Personal Trainer - Cooking.mp3
description: This is groovy and I love it.
title: Personal Trainer: Cooking
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\54. Marionation Gear.mp3
description: This remix is so great! I love the creepy, intense, piano-based, classy vibe. It's from an obscure Japan-only DS game. I can't get enough of it.
title: Marionation Gear
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\55. Wii Shop Channel.mp3
description: Fantastic, excellent. I feel so strongly about both the Wii Shop Channel and Mii Channel music and I am frankly delighted that this party remix exists. All our lives are enriched because of it.
title: Wii Shop Channel
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\56. Wii Shop Channel.mp3
description: The original. It's a classic. It's timeless. Well actually it's extremely 2007 but whatever.
title: Wii Shop Channel
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\57. Mii Plaza.mp3
description: So good. I enjoy the slow, lumbering pace compared to the other remix. It's fun, it's a bit silly. A bit clown-like.
title: Mii Plaza
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\58. Mii Channel.mp3
description: Believe it or not this is a remix. They spruced it up a little, because the original is indeed very sparse. Still great though.
title: Mii Channel
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\59. Charge! - Wii Play.mp3
description: This music is pretty shit. It's music for 45 year women who like horses. Maybe.
title: Charge! - Wii Play
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\60. Title Theme - Wii Sports.mp3
description: They served us with yet another Wii Sports theme and why not, this one is even more maximalist than previous ones.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\61. Opening Theme & Select (Wii Sports).mp3
description: I love this original theme. So emblematic of that classic Wii era vibe. Bring back 2007. There's also a part where the organ takes over the melody and it's so needlessly emotional and dramatic. Also when the select screen hits? Kinda great.
title: Opening Theme/Select
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\62. Wii Sports Series Medley.mp3
description: I think I prefer this to the ultimate remix. The funk direction is better. I also like the Wii Sports Resort select screen a lot.
title: Wii Sports Series Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\63. Title Theme - Wii Sports Resort.mp3
description: I really like this music, it's almost as good as the original theme. That opening blast is great.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\64. Wii Sports Resort.mp3
description: This one is so Mario Kart Wii coded it hurts. It's just Luigi Circuit but slightly different.
title: Wii Sports Resort
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\65. Wii Sports Resort Ver. 2.mp3
description: This remixer did not give a fuck and just remixed this song twice! This one is nicer I think.
title: Wii Sports Resort Ver. 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\66. Title Theme - Wii Sports Club.mp3
description: I don't know about this one. I don't anyone played this game and the remix isn't inspiring me.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\67. Tennis (Training).mp3
description: It alludes to original Wii Sports but it's just not the same.
title: Tennis (Training)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\68. Baseball (Training).mp3
description: This is boring.
title: Baseball (Training)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\69. Excite Truck.mp3
description: The screeching guitar at the beginning really ruins it. That being said the guitar melody is SO FAMILIAR. I think some other remix references it and I can't remember what. It's killing me.
title: Excite Truck
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\70. Attack - Soma Bringer.mp3
description: Pretty plain and boring track.
title: Attack
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\71. Glory of Heracles.mp3
description: Wild, they brought in the feudal Japanese remixers for this and King Dedede's theme specifically. It serves for some variety! I think it's alright.
title: Glory of Heracles
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\72. PERFORMANCE.mp3
description: I really enjoy this cheeky track. It's a little hidden gem.
title: PERFORMANCE
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 31: Other

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 31 - Other (3DS, GC, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (2001)\73. Blue Birds.mp3
description: Flamenco / Paso Doble (?) music, why not. It's alright.
